author: driver--design-phase-0-workspace-scaffold-md-1136
content: Plan: Create the full Cargo workspace scaffold with 10 library crates, 1 facade crate, 1 CLI tool, and 4 example crates. All Cargo.toml files with correct inter-crate and external dependencies per vitreous-architecture.md. All lib.rs files with pub mod declarations and pub use re-exports. All module files empty. Shader .wgsl stubs in vitreous_render. Edition 2024 throughout. cfg-gated vitreous_platform/vitreous_web in facade. Then verify with cargo check --workspace.
